title: Sarepta (SRPT) Q2 2024 Earnings Top Estimates - Sales Lag, Analyst View Weak
text:
Sarepta Therapeutics reported mixed Q2 2024 earnings results, beating on earnings but missing on revenue. The company reported revenue of $362.93 million, which was 8.41% worse than the analyst estimate for revenue of $396.26 million.

Earnings Performance: Sarepta beat analyst estimates for earnings per share in Q2 2024, despite missing on revenue expectations. This discrepancy suggests stronger margins despite lower top-line growth.

Net Product Revenue: Total net product revenue of $361 million, representing a 51% increase year-over-year. ELEVIDYS: $121.7 million. EXONDYS 51: $129.8 million. VYONDYS 53: $31.6 million. AMONDYS 45: $7.4 million. PMO franchise total: $238.8 million.

Key Development: ELEVIDYS received broad FDA approval in June 2024, making it available to over 80% of Duchenne patients in the U.S. This approval was expected to drive strong growth in subsequent quarters.

Forward Guidance: Company expects modest growth in Q3 2024, followed by approximately double-digit growth in Q4 2024. 2025 guidance: Net product revenue between $2.9 billion and $3.1 billion across all four approved therapies.

Commercial Execution: Early demand signals for expanded ELEVIDYS label were robust. Processed over 1,000 antibody screening kit requests within weeks of label expansion. Enrollment forms exceeded internal expectations. 75% of treatment sites have already dosed patients under the expanded label.

Financial Status: Company achieved cash flow positive status for the first time in company history during Q2.
